title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Myntra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Myntra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!
